title: Ice Lolly Mould 6 Pieces Reusable Silicone Popsicle Mold Easy to Remove Ice Lolly Maker - BPA Free Ice Pop Mould (Green)
features: Reliable Quality Ice Lolly Mould: Our molds are made of premium food grade silicone,BPA free, so you can rest assured that will be kept healthy and safe.Durable material will not crack or leak in the future,meaning less money spent buying replacements and many years of enjoying making different recipes and creations

Easy to Use and Reusable Ice Pop Molds: Nothing could be better than Lying on the sofa and having a sweet ice cream on a hot summer. You can add fruit, juice or other things you want to add to the ice molds to make ice-cream of different flavors.Come with 6 reusable sticks,each time you are able to make 6 3.3 OZ popsicles,could make 6 different tastes at one time

Easy Release Ice Cream Mould:Since the ice pop molds is non stick, flexible silicone,easily release your popsicle,no inverting required; simply pull out.You will not have to worry about the kids waiting to enjoy their treats. Give it to your child or guest, and see the smiles as they enjoy

Dishwasher Safe And Save Your Time:The silicone popsicle molds easier to pull out than plastic or stainless steel. And this material cleaning is very convenient,you can flip them inside out and clean by you hands or put it in the dishwasher

Enjoy a Cool Summer:The package have cleaning brush and popsicles recipes(The recipe is more like recipe journal, each recipe is like a little story)Your can make all-natural ice-cream of different flavors easily, like juices, yogurt, fruit, and other things you want to add to your popsicles. Lying on sofa and eating all-natural ice cream on a hot summer
description: From the manufacturer About our Ice Lolly Molds: ●Made of premium food grade silicone,BPA free, so you can rest assured that will be kept healthy and safe.Durable material will not crack or leak in the future,meaning less money spent buying replacements and many years of enjoying making different recipes and creations ●Nothing could be better than Lying on the sofa and having a sweet ice cream on a hot summer. You can add fruit, juice or other things you want to add to the ice molds to make ice-cream of different flavors. ●Since the ice Lolly molds is non stick, flexible silicone,easily release your popsicle,no inverting required; simply pull out.You will not have to worry about the kids waiting to enjoy their treats. ●The silicone popsicle molds easier to pull out than plastic or stainless steel. And this material cleaning is very convenient,you can flip them inside out and clean by you hands or put it in the dishwasher Do you want to DIY your own unique Popsicle Molds? Do you want to make homemade treats for your families or friends? Do you think the Popsicle purchased from the store are not healthy? Nothing could be better than sitting back in your garden and having a sweet icy pop on a hot summer. You can add fruit, juice or any other things you want to add to the ice molds to make different flavors ice-cream. About our Ice Lolly Molds: ●Made of high quality Food Grade Silicone.BPA free.You can use our ice pop maker safely and make healthy ice Popsicle. ●Easy to Use and Reusable: Due to the soft silicone ,this Popsicle easily takes out once frozen.It is a wonderful thing to eat a Popsicle on a hot summer day. And you can eat the flavors you want, save money without going to the store. ●Easy to Clean：You don't have to worry about wasting a lot of time to clean it.Due to silicone material,you can flip them inside out and clean by you hands or put it in the dishwasher. ●Bring Happiness to Your Life：It is a good time to make Ice Popsicles at home with families or invite friends at the weekend.You can exchange ideas and make different favorite products.Start your Summer with a Healthy and Funny way. Package Contents: 1 x Ice Lolly Molds with 6 Holes 6 x Ice Sticks"
